question: How does blaCTX-M-15 confer antibiotic resistance in Klebsiella pneumoniae, and which antibiotics does it affect? Summarize the mechanism and clinical relevance.

citations.title: Comparison of multiple cefiderocol susceptibility testing methods against genomic determinants of resistance in blaNDM carbapenemase producing Enterobacterales
